title: Spartans Above Diamonds
description: Addon for Spartan's Weaponry that adds support for Ores Above Diamonds
body:
## A Spartan Weaponry & Ores Above Diamond addon

**Requires [Spartan Weaponry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spartan-weaponry/files/4467344) and [Ores Above Diamond](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ores-above-diamonds) in order to work!** This mod is for Forge 1.12.2

Adds in a full set of weapons for Amethyst and Black Opal, this mod was commissioned by **kkarrot**. Now with recipes!

Contenttweaker information for modpack developers: This mod's item prefix is `spartansabovediamonds`

You are free to use this mod in your modpacks.
